Home › Services › Modern Hijazi villa design

Modern Hijazi architecture — Jeddah

Modern Hijazi villa design

Hijazi architecture solved climate and privacy centuries ago through the rawshan, the courtyard and stone. We reinterpret that wisdom in a clean modern language — a villa that belongs to Jeddah with a clear identity, neither a Western copy nor a heritage replica.

Book a free call on WhatsApp Send plot details

Rawshan and mashrabiya

Perforated timber screens shade, ventilate and give privacy — we redesign them in modern proportions and contemporary fabrication rather than literal copying.

Courtyard and stone

An internal courtyard brings light and air deep into the home in full privacy, and local stone ties the villa to its ground while tempering its climate.

From our work

All work →

Montashiri Villa

Villas · Obhur, Jeddah · 2025

Stone Majlis

Interiors · Riyadh · 2024 Concept study

Frequently asked questions about private villa design

What’s the difference between modern Hijazi and traditional?

We take Hijazi principles (privacy, shading, the courtyard) and express them in modern lines and materials, not copied ornament.

Do you design villa façades with a modern Hijazi character?

Yes — the modern Hijazi façade is among the most distinctive parts of our work: stone, a contemporary rawshan and layered shade.

Does this character suit Jeddah’s modern districts?

Perfectly — it gives the villa distinction and identity among look-alike houses, with better climate performance.
